content.full_text:
February 24, 2005

Valerie A. Aprahamian
TOP Educational Consultants
3499 Christopher Lane
Corona, CA 92882

Re: Your February 18, 2005 Correspondence

Dear Ms. Aprahamian:

Thank you for your general concerns regarding your community advisory committee, vice chairman position and representation of children in IEP meetings within the Corona-Norco Unified School District.

Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D) provides that the Commission may decline to provide advice where the request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act. (See also, Reg. 18329(c)(4)(F), copy enclosed.) Since your letter concerns Government Code section 1126 and incompatible activities, a topic not covered by the Act, we would not be the agency to respond to your request.

Sincerely,

John Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure
